nasb.text: After him Nehemiah the son of Azbuk, official of half the district of Beth-zur, made repairs as far as a point opposite the tombs of David, and as far as the artificial pool and the house of the mighty men.

esv.text: After him Nehemiah the son of Azbuk, ruler of half the district of Beth-zur, repaired to a point opposite the tombs of David, as far as the artificial pool, and as far as the house of the mighty men.

cnv.text: 下一段由管理半個伯．夙的區長，押卜的兒子尼希米修築，直到大衛墓地的對面，又到人工池和勇士之家。

ccb.text: 再下一段由押卜的儿子、管理半个伯·夙的尼希米修筑，他一直修到大卫墓地对面，远至人工池和勇士堂。
